textByHashes.55531a27849581af2c21f4934f5f57148f1de191: Greetings. What wisdom do you seek?
textByHashes.93f9ba496d21b46d7aa53f48b9f96130939b4eb4: Well young one, you have entered the Magic Training Arena. It was built at the start of the Fifth Age, when runestones were first discovered. It was made because of the many pointless accidents caused by inexperienced
textByHashes.269d6ef7f5fc45a9c6fd44ee07f49a2b9323f8e5: Good question. It was originally made by the ancestors of the wizards in the Wizards Tower. However, it was destroyed by melee and ranged warriors who took offence at the use of this new 'Magic Art'. Recently,
textByHashes.cbc77fc9502b47725d92564965bb418585db0098: the current denizens of the Wizards Tower have resurrected the arena including various Guardians you will see as you look around. We are here to help and to ensure things run smoothly.
textByHashes.34f56ac45fb671cbe6a53a84896be1e78861d685: You may train up your skill in the magic arts by travelling through one of the portals at the back of this entrance hall. By training up in one of these areas you will be awarded special Pizazz Points unique to
textByHashes.6d167d9b3327011cc5ddd81c38087e7c03420da7: each room. With these points you may claim a variety of items from my fellow guardian up the stairs.
textByHashes.6242b8f447d3099f3685a901d031d33f5e92b05e: You really are full of questions! You will need a special Pizazz Progress Hat! I can give you one if you so wish to train here.
textByHashes.0d89cf49febe858be443947f8a1690c7f507799f: Ah, I'm afraid I can't give it to you as you don't have room to carry it!
textByHashes.fb624b88c0cd71da8e9772b1fa031693b1edb676: Here you go. Talk to the hat to find out your current Pizazz Point totals.
textByHashes.199dabf994c5a9474976c7902f65afa4a8087957: Well of course, it's a magic Pizazz Progress Hat! Mind your manners though, hats have feelings too!
textByHashes.7a5ae2f8b435d0d2e6c56c59f121b83e57463268: Oh, and a word of warning: should you decide to leave the rooms by any method other than the exit portals, you will be teleported to the entrance and have any items that you picked up in the room removed.
textByHashes.dbce2e59a3ee0913c6bf8777595f7d34e24abd7f: They lead to four areas to train your magic: The Telekinetic Theatre, The Alchemists' Playground, The Enchanting Chamber, and The Creature Graveyard.
textByHashes.c85a4acdaa7293c406053deddea6e6366861fc83: In there you can earn Telekinetic Pizazz Points for trade upstairs.
textByHashes.583b17a7244d3051bccfaeae40f966c6f620792f: That depends on how much of a time-waster you are! You are required to use the Telekinetic Grab spell in order to move a statue through a maze. Casting the spell will move the statue towards you until it reaches
textByHashes.6c149285e089cdf514c963f80036ddac22a91619: a wall. So by standing on the different sides of the maze you can move the statue North, East, South or West. You will be rewarded Pizazz Points for each maze successfully solved.
textByHashes.ac977cf4fb8b140db300be2b98d745235c7454eb: It will be clearer when you arrive and there's a Guardian through the portal that will be able to tell you more. There's a book you can buy from the Rewards Guardian upstairs that will explain it all.
textByHashes.0a71159aa954f976a1241baed79308e8e3e387b8: In the playground you can earn Alchemist Pizazz Points for trading with the rewards guardian upstairs.
textByHashes.b0583f65d1fa20328c5614039761aac2312f657d: You'll find eight cupboards containing items you can turn to gold using the low and high alchemy spells. The money you earn will be taken from you upon leaving the playground to pay for the upkeep of this training
textByHashes.f7f67c2e27ab8d66f01bdfe66947ccccb8251730: arena and to help fund magic shops around Gielinor. You will be rewarded with 1 Pizazz Point for every 100 coins deposited and a percentage of the money you create. Keep in mind that you will not be able to take
textByHashes.c5add994cbc8d67d7550958b58118bfd98f1ac9e: more than 1000 coins back out with you.
textByHashes.fc6bf66f99f353222a3dd2fc3a096eed70719b43: I am afraid not, for the cost of the items varies, as does their locations in the cupboards. You'll see a list of item costs that will help you decide what you should be converting to gold.
textByHashes.09b5ac26f753c9670a133e24bb101d44e6582d5b: Fear not, it will be clearer when you arrive and there's a Guardian through the portal that will be able to tell you more. You can also buy a book from the Rewards Guardian upstairs that will explain it all.
textByHashes.a303d2d02b1f9cbe6c8b7e353eba25d0d26a5d51: In here you will be able to earn Enchantment Pizazz Points for trade upstairs.
textByHashes.4c4e79e51a14eb2f1b4a4a1ba7fc88c8c0d4b68f: You will find yourself amongst various piles of shapes. You can pick up these shapes and use one of your enchanting spells upon it to morph it into an orb. You'll also see a hole in the centre of the room; put the orbs
textByHashes.46607b271a672cff3f007619a60991c3ca1cbed5: in here and for every 20 we will credit you with a gift. You will get Pizazz Points for every 10 shapes that you convert and the amount of points depends on the spell you use.
textByHashes.f3906c2b64e71a25f0e77388fb995a16672efc43: Ah, you will be notified of a different shape that will give you a bonus Pizazz Point when you convert that shape. You should also look out for dragon stones, as these will give you more Pizazz Points when you
textByHashes.ad01bc54dc90039ed375a6322f80480c6457a5be: It will be clearer when you arrive and there's a Guardian through the portal that will be able to tell you more. You can also buy a book from the Rewards Guardian upstairs that will explain it all.
textByHashes.3ae171a89915c51e3e3efde0d12bb2508dd4b9d3: In here you will be able to earn Graveyard Pizazz Points for trade upstairs.
textByHashes.70c2a092638fb919fdc3dbdd438eab06e9b530d9: Patience young one. A great many creatures die in this world and much of their remains can cause clutter. We have taken it upon ourselves to teleport many bones from these creatures into this graveyard for a
textByHashes.442d083947a32cc19eda6dfbf0c38509fb95a98c: use. It's up to you to practice your bones to bananas spell in order to put these bones into immediate use - nutritious food for monsters! Just convert the bones and put them in the holes in the walls. There is a
textByHashes.5ad0e52e44ae3ba66f3d343f7fb3a43a19a398ac: drawback to this room however, the bones often fall on people so you may want to eat some of those bananas to stay alive. When people die we confiscate Pizazz Points for the effort of teleporting incompetent mages.
textByHashes.6d21006bbc66c455ac61302471f08ed4bb5ce3bd: As well as the Pizazz Points for giving us the bananas, you will be credited with runestones for your efforts, and you may be able to save up for a new kind of spell to use in the graveyard!
textByHashes.a7edabc52e4cea97f90d06e74fa608d1cd253f3f: It will be clearer when you arrive and one of my fellow guardians through the portal will be able to tell you more. You can also buy a book from the Rewards Guardian upstairs that will explain it all.
textByHashes.4e79451a3cf31346f040bb3f305c219d60f48533: You won't gain with that attitude.
textByHashes.531a7cacdb7fe295b3fdec3a3c7b69ac55bb8ab1: Very well. You have entered the magic training arena. It was built at the start of the Fifth Age, when runestones were first discovered. It was built to put an end to many pointless accidents involving inexperienced
textByHashes.09a391fa8432307e7573d031b62f6e14869bd7ef: You may train up your skill in the magic arts by travelling through one of the portals at the back of this building. By training up in one of these areas you will be awarded Pizazz Points unique to each room. With
textByHashes.705f4061e0dc10feaf3dcdf0c4b011ff41e3c10a: these points you may claim a variety of items from my fellow guardian up the stairs.
textByHashes.267053e25847ce1bd4f7082cc24680435b5dd21e: With the Pizazz Progress Hat I gave you, of course.
textByHashes.4771b66038759c896cb636457267c35c2ae804b5: Oh, and a word of warning: should you decide to log out whilst in any of the rooms in the arena, you will be teleported to the entrance and have any items that you picked up in the room removed.
textByHashes.383bce948f9e8c70500e2cb693c1305bc241b71c: You want another one don't you.
textByHashes.6cbec550f84bbdf7fcd8f3019b8902797a91fe7a: Collect Pizazz Points from the various areas and the hat will remember your totals. Talk to the hat at any time to find out what points you have. Go upstairs and talk to the Rewards Guardian to claim items for the
